verses.1: I will give you thanks with my whole heart.
verses.2: I will bow down toward your holy temple,
verses.3: In the day that I called, you answered me.
verses.4: All the kings of the earth will give you thanks, LORD,
verses.5: Yes, they will sing of the ways of the LORD,
verses.6: For though the LORD is high, yet he looks after the lowly;
verses.7: Though I walk in the middle of trouble, you will revive me.
verses.8: The LORD will fulfill that which concerns me.
